'''Raider''' was a mercenary [[cargo ferry]]. It attempted to steal from the Azzameens in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], but it was destroyed by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
